summary: Solid functional deliverable with type safety and good separation of concerns, but has notable code quality gaps. Workflow issues: dead code (GIT_TAGS env var set line 34, never used), error suppression with || true (line 18) masks installation failures, no set -euo pipefail for bash safety. Script issues: semver regex /^v?\d+\.\d+/ is too permissive (matches incomplete versions). Test harness uses blocking sync operations throughout; references docker-tags.test.ts without showing it—cannot verify TDD compliance or unit test quality. actionlint validation is called but we see no pass/fail output to confirm workflow syntax. Harness limits to 3 act runs but doesn't assert unit tests actually executed (only that job succeeded). Otherwise structure is reasonable, error handling mostly correct, testing approach sound.
